annotations.text: TUI shows the full task graph: diagnose → parallel fixes (recipe + presentation) → final taste test.
An agent picks up diagnose-flat-pancakes and investigates the problem. Diagnosis completes quickly.
Two tasks become ready at once — fix-pancake-recipe and improve-presentation fan out to parallel agents.
Both agents work simultaneously. One fixes the recipe, the other improves plating. Neither blocks the other.
Both fixes land. The final-taste-test task unblocks and an agent picks it up to verify the result.
All four tasks done — pipeline complete. Flat pancakes diagnosed, fixed, and verified end-to-end.
